prestazioni: Engine: CZSE 3.0L V6 TFSI (EA839) with a custom Stage 2+ ECU remap by APR (software version APR230001) targeting 520 HP and 580 lb-ft torque, utilizing a high-flow downpipe (034 Motorsport Catted Downpipe) and upgraded intercooler (AWE Track Edition Intercooler) to reduce intake temps by 22°C under full load

Forced Induction: Hybrid turbo upgrade (Pure Stage 2 Turbocharger) with billet compressor wheel (6+6 blade design) and reinforced actuator, paired with a custom 3.5-inch intake system (Eventuri Carbon Fiber Intake) and high-flow fuel injectors (Bosch 0261500415, 1050cc/min)

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (valved specifically for the SQ5 Sportback Competition chassis) with 20mm front and 15mm rear camber plates (034 Motorsport Adjustable Camber Plates), paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars and polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport Subframe Bushings)
estetica: Aero: Maxton Design SQ5 Sportback Competition-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with integrated canards (Maxton Design Carbon Fiber Canards) and a custom 3D-printed rear wing (Vorsteiner VR-103 wing adapted for the Sportback roofline)

Wheels & Tires: HRE FF01 21x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x12 ET45 (rear) forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/21 front, 305/25/21 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear big brake kit (380mm front rotors, 356mm rear rotors) with custom red caliper covers (Audi Sport Competition Edition branding)

Exterior & Interior: Full respray in Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7Z) with matte black accents (OEM+ Audi Sport S-line badges removed and replaced with debadged look), carbon fiber mirror caps (034 Motorsport Carbon Fiber Mirrors), and a custom interior roll cage (Autopower 6-point bolt-in cage) wrapped in Alcantara (Sparco Assetto Gara seats with custom SQ5 Competition embroidery)
